generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing temperature data for post-occupancy monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing light levels for post-occupancy monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing occupancy data for post-occupancy monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools, EclipseDitto
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata for sensors including device specifications and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance ActuatorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata for actuators including device specifications and configuration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance MiddlewareConfigurations : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for HVAC system control configured via BIM models"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for lighting systems configured via BIM models"
]

]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for scenario analysis and forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation results for building performance analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for managing non-visual health effects through environmental adjustments"
]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting systems for visual comfort and health"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Action [

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for decentralized integration"
]

    base:desc "Living Lab case study for building operations monitoring and optimization throughout its life cycle"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightLevelSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACActuator, LightingController, BuildingBIMModel, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, BIMAuthoringTools, RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService, RealTimeMonitoringInsight, SimulationResultsInsight, EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectInsight, AdjustHVACAction, AdjustLightingAction, Interactive3DVisualization, ModularArchitecture
]

    base:desc "Control signals from the DT to physical actuators via Building Control Systems (BCS) for adjusting building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [

]

]

]

]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [

]
